main.description: Subscribe to stream of chat events targeted to moderation. Private endpoint.

cursor.description: The last known event seq number to backfill from. Use '2222222222222' to backfill from the beginning. Don't specify a cursor to listen only for new events.

errors.name: ConsumerTooSlow
errors.description: If the consumer of the stream can not keep up with events, and a backlog gets too large, the server will drop the connection.

recipients.description: The list of DIDs message recipients. Does not include the sender, which is in the `user` field

user.description: The DID of the message author.
